mapper.select:
SELECT operationRecord.id,operationRecord.event_type,operationRecord.create_time, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d ' ), (CASE DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%w' ) WHEN 0 THEN '星期日' WHEN 1 THEN '星期一' WHEN 2 THEN '星期二' WHEN 3 THEN '星期三' WHEN 4 THEN '星期四' WHEN 5 THEN '星期五' WHEN 6 THEN '星期六' END )) AS browse_time,dataInfo.data_id,dataInfo.data_title,dataInfo.data_type, dataInfo.file_suffix FROM t_user_operation_record operationRecord INNER JOIN t_data_info dataInfo ON operationRecord.event_id = dataInfo.data_id AND operationRecord.event_type = '13'
AND operationRecord.user_id = #{userId}
AND operationRecord.operation_type = '16'
UNION SELECT operationRecord.id,operationRecord.event_type,operationRecord.create_time, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d ' ), (CASE DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%w' ) WHEN 0 THEN '星期日' WHEN 1 THEN '星期一' WHEN 2 THEN '星期二' WHEN 3 THEN '星期三' WHEN 4 THEN '星期四' WHEN 5 THEN '星期五' WHEN 6 THEN '星期六' END )) AS browse_time,problemInfo.problem_id AS data_id,problemInfo.problem_title AS data_title, '' AS data_type,'' AS file_suffix FROM t_user_operation_record operationRecord INNER JOIN t_problem_info problemInfo ON operationRecord.event_id = problemInfo.problem_id AND operationRecord.event_type = '14'
AND operationRecord.user_id = #{userId}
AND operationRecord.operation_type = '16'
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT operationRecord.id,operationRecord.event_type,operationRecord.create_time, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d ' ), (CASE DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%w' ) WHEN 0 THEN '星期日' WHEN 1 THEN '星期一' WHEN 2 THEN '星期二' WHEN 3 THEN '星期三' WHEN 4 THEN '星期四' WHEN 5 THEN '星期五' WHEN 6 THEN '星期六' END )) AS browse_time,dataInfo.data_id,dataInfo.data_title,dataInfo.data_type, dataInfo.file_suffix FROM t_user_operation_record operationRecord INNER JOIN t_data_info dataInfo ON operationRecord.event_id = dataInfo.data_id AND operationRecord.event_type = '13'
AND operationRecord.user_id = #{userId}
AND operationRecord.operation_type = '17'
UNION SELECT operationRecord.id,operationRecord.event_type,operationRecord.create_time, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d ' ), (CASE DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%w' ) WHEN 0 THEN '星期日' WHEN 1 THEN '星期一' WHEN 2 THEN '星期二' WHEN 3 THEN '星期三' WHEN 4 THEN '星期四' WHEN 5 THEN '星期五' WHEN 6 THEN '星期六' END )) AS browse_time,problemComment.comment_id AS data_id,problemComment.comment_content AS data_title, '' AS data_type,'' AS file_suffix FROM t_user_operation_record operationRecord INNER JOIN t_problem_comment problemComment ON operationRecord.event_id = problemComment.comment_id AND operationRecord.event_type = '15'
AND operationRecord.user_id = #{userId}
AND operationRecord.operation_type = '17'
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT operationRecord.id,operationRecord.event_type,operationRecord.create_time, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d ' ), (CASE DATE_FORMAT( operationRecord.create_time, '%w' ) WHEN 0 THEN '星期日' WHEN 1 THEN '星期一' WHEN 2 THEN '星期二' WHEN 3 THEN '星期三' WHEN 4 THEN '星期四' WHEN 5 THEN '星期五' WHEN 6 THEN '星期六' END )) AS browse_time,dataInfo.data_id,dataInfo.data_title,dataInfo.data_type, dataInfo.file_suffix FROM t_user_operation_record operationRecord INNER JOIN t_data_info dataInfo ON operationRecord.event_id = dataInfo.data_id AND operationRecord.event_type = '13'
AND operationRecord.user_id = #{userId}
AND operationRecord.operation_type = '19'
ORDER BY create_time DESC
